title: CMDCam Fabric
body:
This is an **unofficial** Fabric port of creativemd's **CMDCam** mod. You can find the original project [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/cmdcam). # Trailer
# New Features & Enhancements - **Scene Switching** - switch between up to 9 different scenes using numpad (or any other keybind you set). - **Scene Saving** - save your camera paths using `/cam save-scenes` in JSON format to share scenes with other players. Works in both singleplayer and multiplayer! # Features - **Smooth Camera Paths** - **Roll Rotation** - **Zooming** - **Targeting/following blocks or entities** - **Different Interpolations** # Usage - Press **P** to add a point. - Press **U** to start the animation (default time: 10 seconds). - `/cam add [number]` - Register a point at the current position. - `/cam stop` - Stops the animation. - `/cam start [loops (-1 = endless)]` - Starts the animation with the given duration. - `/cam clear` - Deletes all registered points. - `/cam save-scenes [name]` - Saves scenes into `.minecraft/cam-scenes` - `/cam load-scenes [name]` - Loads scenes from `.minecraft/cam-scenes` # Credits - **creativemd** - Original CMDCam creator. - **BluSpring** - This port is based on his fork. This port was created for the [Kreate Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/geekscreate).
